tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive exited 0 with sponsored_poc + desktop + rust + full track.

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh from project dir reports Context7 MCP installed and configured; 54 OK / 0 manual / 0 auto-fixable.

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: Running init.sh from $FRAMEWORK exited 1 with 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' message (PR #18 / U-N + U-O verified).

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed via --complete-step. No artifact checks block these.

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: After all phase1 steps complete and gate passes, .current_phase remains 0 — no script auto-advances. Confirms U-D is still open.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after Phase 1 gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After init.sh, run --start-phase1 then iterate --complete-step phase1_architecture:<each step>; then run scripts/check-phase-gate.sh (exits 0, 'Phase gates consistent'); jq '.current_phase' .claude/phase-state.json still returns 0.
framework_bugs.expected: After Phase 1 steps complete and gate passes, .current_phase should advance to 1 (or 2 after approval).
framework_bugs.actual: current_phase stays 0 indefinitely. There is no documented script that performs the advancement.

documentation_gaps.gap: Builders guide does not document the script (or manual jq invocation) used to advance .current_phase after a phase gate passes.

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: tests_written, tests_verified_failing, implemented, security_audit (with stub findings file), documentation_updated, feature_recorded all completed sequentially with rc=0.

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' returned 0; commit landed as cf8d088.

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: Direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded (rc=0). PreToolUse hook is not invoked when commits are issued directly from a non-Claude-Code shell. Confirms U-C is still open. Logged as documentation_gap, not a new bug, per runbook.

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After `--record-feature uat-feat-1`, process-checklist.sh --check-commit-message 'feat(uat-grace): grace test' returned 0 — grace window is active (PR #17 fix verified).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: With .claude/pending-approval.json present, piping a `git commit` PreToolUse payload into pre-commit-gate.sh returned a 'permissionDecision: deny' JSON. Sentinel reader works (PR #16 / BL-015 verified).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: scripts/pending-approval.sh --resolve removed the sentinel; subsequent pre-commit-gate.sh invocation returned no deny output.

documentation_gaps.gap: U-C confirmation: BL-006 only blocks commits routed through Claude Code's PreToolUse hook; direct shell `git commit` bypasses the gate. There is no native git commit-msg hook installed by init.sh.
documentation_gaps.where: BL-010 / scripts/pre-commit-gate.sh wiring (no commit-msg hook fallback)

tests.name: start_phase3_exits_zero
tests.details: process-checklist.sh --start-phase3 exited 0; FEATURES.md feature-completeness check passed.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: Built a populated uat-session-1.html with 2 valid scenarios (state-restatement, expected ≥60 chars, concrete assertions). lint-uat-scenarios.sh exits 0 with 'All 2 scenarios clean.'

tests.name: each_uat_step_completes
tests.details: All 9 UAT_STEPS (agents_dispatched through gate_passed) completed via --complete-step uat_session:<step> with rc=0.

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All PHASE3_STEPS completed with stubs (semgrep, accessibility, performance, integration, etc. — all 'scan stubbed for UAT'); legal_review treated as N/A (no PRIVACY_POLICY.md); gate_passed step succeeded.

tests.name: start_phase4_exits_zero
tests.details: Phase 4 is correctly blocked for sponsored_poc projects: 'Phase 4 (production release) is blocked — project is in sponsored poc mode. POC projects complete at Phase 3.' This is expected sponsored_poc gating, NOT a bug. Per the framework, sponsored_poc must run scripts/upgrade-project.sh --to-production to unlock Phase 4. Sections E (each_phase4_step_completes, handoff_md_required, release_notes_required, phase4_completion_state) are not applicable to a base sponsored_poc agent.

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: N/A — sponsored_poc gates Phase 4 until upgrade. No regression.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: N/A — sponsored_poc completes at Phase 3 (current_phase remains 0 due to U-D).

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: Grep for password|api[_-]?key|secret|token across project surfaced only documentation/template hits (PROJECT_INTAKE.md tool list, evaluation-prompts/* security docs). No literal secrets committed.

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during this run; .claude/process-audit.log correctly absent.

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD = d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (matches captured baseline). git status --short shows only the pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ that were present before this agent ran.

summary: Base sponsored_poc/desktop/full all sections succeeded; PR #17/#18/#19 fixes verified (BL-016 non-interactive init, U-H helpers copied, U-N/U-O framework-self guard, BL-015 sentinel, BL-006 grace window); U-C and U-D re-confirmed at Medium/doc-gap as expected.
